results.title: ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter
results.snippet: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.

results.title: Tripod Adapters | GoPro
results.snippet: Tripod Adapters These adapters let you attach your GoPro to any tripod, monopod or camera accessory with a standard 1/4-20 mount. The finger adapter lets you mount your GoPro directly to the tripod, while the ball joint adapter makes your tripod more versatile by letting you tilt and rotate your cam

results.title: Amazon.com: Gopro Mount Adapter
results.snippet: Explore versatile GoPro mount adapters compatible with tripods, monopods, and selfie sticks. Find quality options for secure mounting.

results.title: 1/4"-20 Aluminum Camera Adapter with 20mm Ball + Action Camera GoPro Mount
results.snippet: 1x GoPro-compatible Action Camera Mount This adapter features the popular 1/4"-20 thread found on most tripods and fits into the bottom of most cameras in addition to being compatible with select RubiGrid® dash mounts.

results.title: iBOLT™ ¼ 20" Camera Screw to GoPro Adapter
results.snippet: This iBOLT™ GoPro adapter converts standard camera mounts or tripods for mounting GoPro HERO action cameras. Turn your standard camera mount, tripod, and other camera accessories with a 1/4"-20 mounting bolt to an industry-standard GoPro Action accessory or mount.

results.title: Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter
results.snippet: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory. Designed to work with mounts, tripods, and other accessories featuring a 1/4"-20 mounting bolt, it is compatible with GoPro HERO4, HERO3+, HERO3, HERO2, and HERO action cameras.

results.title: Joby Pin Joint Mount - Filmtools
results.snippet: The Joby Pin Joint GoPro Mount - Black is an adapter with a small footprint that enables mounting cameras with a 3-prong mount to a tripod with a 1/4"-20 threaded mounting screw.

results.title: GoPro Tripod Adapter Set ABQRT-003 B&H Photo Video
results.snippet: The ball head adapter mounts on a tripod using a 1/4"-20 thread on the bottom and features a quick release clamp mount that accepts any GoPro mounting buckle. A thumbscrew is included to secure your camera to the 3-prong mount.
